en: If your company has tax or social responsibilities in Germany, you will be asked to provide Tax Clearance Declaration in a subsequent form.
This includes having a physical presence, employing workers in Germany, or performing services on-site—even temporarily.
Does your organization have operations, personnel, or contractual obligations in Germany that could give rise to local tax or social security responsibilities?
Please select one of the below options:
We only deliver goods to Germany and have no on-site or personnel presence.
We do not engage in any activity in Germany that creates tax or social insurance obligations.
